---
title: "Montagu Boyle, Countess of Glasgow"
---

## Montagu Boyle, Countess of Glasgow

**Dates:** (d. 1931)

**Maiden name:** (Abercromby)

### Description

philanthropist

### Biography

She was wife of the 6th Earl of Glasgow (d. 1890), the original of Harry in Catherine Sinclair’s <i>Holiday House</i>.

### Letters

- [To the Countess of Glasgow, Sept 25th 1898](../letters/3381_To_the_Countess_of_Glasgow.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
